creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Please hold this.  After emailing with Alexandre Ratchov (sndio's maintainer) I don't think this is the best forward atm.  During their privsep work on sndiod, the OpenBSD devs broke chaining multiple sndiod daemons and other features.  I'll move this update to https://github.com/t6/wip-ports/ and I hope I can revisit capsicumizing sndiod later once this is fixed.

I'll submit an update to the portable version with only the OSS improvements soon.
